'''AB-4''' was a [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]] that served at the [[Advance Base Baskarn]] on [[Baskarn]]. It was programmed for bureaucracy and was in charge of base logistics and equipment. More often than not, [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] serving at the base would receive reprimands for damaging valuable equipment, even if it was not valuable.
